title: Eurowrap Set of 3 Christmas Eve Delivery Toy Chests Gift Boxes - Elf Arrival Box - Santa and Friends Design - Christmas Eve Delivery Gift Box - 3 Assorted Sizes
features: 🎄 Festive Christmas Design: Vibrant red boxes with cheerful holiday illustrations of Santa, elves, and a Christmas train.
🎁 Versatile Uses: Ideal for Christmas Eve surprises, gift storage, or as decorative festive storage chests.
📏 Assorted Sizes: Set includes 3 boxes in Large (50cm x 35cm x 30cm), Medium (45cm x 32cm x 27cm), and Small (40cm x 29cm x 25.5cm) sizes.
🛠️ Durable and Secure: Made from sturdy cardboard with a real metal clasp for secure closure and reusability.
✨ Ready for Christmas Magic: Perfect for creating memorable holiday moments with family and friends.
description: Add festive magic to your gift-giving with this Set of 3 Christmas Eve Delivery Toy Chests Gift Boxes. Featuring a cheerful design with a Christmas train, Santa, elves, and holiday trees, these boxes are perfect for storing presents, treats, or decorations. Made from durable cardboard, each box comes with a real metal clasp for added elegance and secure closure. The set includes three boxes in assorted sizes: Large (50cm x 35cm x 30cm), Medium (45cm x 32cm x 27cm), and Small (40cm x 29cm x 25.5cm). Whether used as Christmas Eve boxes, festive storage, or decorative gift chests, they add a delightful touch to your holiday celebrations.
